title: Wither's Wrath
description: A revamped fight for the Wither! with parity features from bedrock to original ideas to make the wither fight more challenging.
body:
### **Optional Resource pack for Music and Models:** [withers-wrath-rp](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/withers-wrath-rp) ### There are 2 versions available for the pack: 1. **Wither's Wrath** being the default hard boss fight 2. **Bedrock**, which only has the bedrock features (click the picture) This is my take on the Wither, designed to make it more of a challenge by introducing brand-new attack patterns and increasing its health to 600 HP, matching the Bedrock Edition Wither. Since not everyone enjoys all the changes, I've included toggles to reduce chaos for more flexibility. However, there will be no "easy" version of this Wither. This Wither was created as a personal project to present a tougher fight and primarily to showcase it to friends. It was never meant to be perfect, but I hope it brings a fun challenge.
--- **This pack was designed for Minecraft version 1.21 and up.** ---
What does this wither include? The Wither has **600HP** with slightly higher armour. It occasionally spawns Wither Skeletons and has stronger Wither skull projectiles. #### Start "Animation" #### Wither Homing Skull Weaker but never misses. _Blocking with a shield is advised._ #### Wither Half HP #### Wither Charge Attack This attack only occurs when the Wither has 250 HP left. #### Wither Dash Attack This happens when the Wither has 100 HP left. #### Wither Death and More!
--- ## How to enable Bedrock Animations + Showcase ## Showcase of the Normal Fight ### if you have any video showcase of the datapack please let me know to add it here. ---
### **Toggle Options** To configure settings, use the following command: `/function wither:config` > ⚠️ **Warning:** > This Wither is highly destructive. Fight it far from your base, or toggle the option to disable destructive features.
---
### **Links** Click below to view or download the data pack in other platforms: [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/ImHer0/witherswrath) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-3FCC9A?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/witherswrath/) [![PlanetMinecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Planet%20Minecraft-2E9FFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=anycubic&logoColor=white)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/wither-s-wrath/)
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-f16e34?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/withers-wrath)
--- ### **Issues** If you run into some issues please take a look [here](https://github.com/ImHer0/witherswrath/wiki/ERROS-ISSUES-fixes) ### **Server Usage** If you're using this on a server, I’d appreciate feedback on any potential performance impacts. Due to limited testing with larger player groups, there might be areas needing optimisation. ### **Permissions** Feel free to use this in any packs, modify it, and make it look more polished or fancy!
